verdict: pass
findings_blocking: 0

finding: B1
scope: in_scope
action: fix
status: resolved
description: cmdFinalize --keep-worktree (linked-worktree path) failed to terminate on crash re-entry when archiveProjectDir returned {skipped:'source-missing'} — archive dir was never staged so the impl commit could not complete. Fixed at claim.js:978 by unshifting kaola-workflow/archive/{project} into candidatePaths on the source-missing branch; re-entry now commits cleanly and second resume returns already_finalized. Covered by testFinalizeIncompleteWorktreeReentryFix (PASSED).
fix_role: implementer

finding: B2
scope: in_scope
action: fix
status: resolved
description: detectFinalizeIncomplete used repo-wide treeDirty, yielding false-positive resumability when unrelated dirty files existed. Fixed by introducing archiveDirDirty (git status --porcelain -- kaola-workflow/archive/{project}); detection is now project-scoped. Covered by testFinalizeIncompleteNegativeControlRepoDirty (PASSED).
fix_role: implementer

finding: NB1
scope: in_scope
action: follow_up
status: deferred
description: cmdResume reroute hardcodes next_command 'finalize --keep-worktree' for all crash-state projects including in-place ones. Non-blocking: cmdFinalize's keep-worktree commit dance is guarded by mainRoot2 !== linkedRoot2, so --keep-worktree is a no-op for in-place projects. Defer context-aware next_command to a follow-up.
fix_role: implementer
